title: Expand corelib syscall coverage and stdlib tests

source.subject: feat(corelib): expand syscall coverage and stdlib tests

body:
## Outcome

Expand syscall coverage and stdlib tests.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`ee3d83d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/ee3d83d) — feat(corelib): expand syscall coverage and stdlib tests
